topStories.description: Conflict, climate change and decades of mismanagement are pushing Iran's already severe water crisis toward a potential collapse of supply systems.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court to look into what constitutes ‘personal data’ in DPDP laws
dailyNews.description: The DPDP laws in effect legalise disproportionate state surveillance, create a compensation vacuum for citizens, dilute the Right to Information, erode the ability of journalists to practice their profession, the petition said

dailyNews.title: Parental income alone cannot decide OBC creamy layer status: Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: Rules in favour of children of senior PSU officials selected as OBC candidates in civil service exams; creamy layer exclusion framework says income from salaries, farm land cannot be included for wealth test

dailyNews.title: West Asia crisis: IGL assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply amid LPG shortage concerns
dailyNews.description: IGL's assurance has come amid global energy market disruptions caused by the escalating conflict in the Middle East involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

dailyNews.title: US Shooting: Two Injured, Gunman Dead At OD University Of Norfolk - What We Know So Far
dailyNews.description: The matter is now being investigated by the police and the identity of the shooter is being ascertained.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court allows withdrawal of plea to bring back Netaji's mortal remains from Tokyo temple
dailyNews.description: The court said it would prefer to have Netaji’s sole heir and daughter, Anita Bose Pfaff, approach it with the prayer directly

dailyNews.title: To protest or not to protest: Iranians face Hamlet's dilemma as Islamic Republic warns of strict action amid conflict
dailyNews.description: As war with Israel and the US intensifies, many Iranians face a dilemma: protest or stay silent. Officials warn of severe punishment for demonstrations, while exiled prince Reza Pahlavi urges resistance. Rights groups say past protests saw thousands killed.

dailyNews.title: Video shows moment Iran strikes US-owned oil tanker near Iraq
dailyNews.description: Iran has released video it says shows the moment one of its explosive-laden boats struck a US-owned oil tanker in Iraq.

dailyNews.title: Up to 3.2 million people displaced across Iran amid US-Israeli attacks: UN
dailyNews.description: UN refugee agency says forced displacement likely to increase as US and Israel continue deadly strikes across Iran.

dailyNews.title: Aftermath of US-Israeli attacks on Tehran
dailyNews.description: Explosions are heard for a 13th day in Iran, Israel and several Middle Eastern states.

dailyNews.title: Bunker-busting bombs loaded onto US planes at UK airbase amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The use of RAF Fairford by US forces highlights the UK's increasingly active role in the US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Bumble shares soar 40% as investors swipe right on AI-powered reboot
dailyNews.description: Bumble shares jumped more than ​40% in early trading ​on Thursday after the company posted upbeat fourth-quarter revenue and ​unveiled an AI-driven overhaul of its apps to lure back younger users.

dailyNews.title: In first message as Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei seeks US base closures, vows Minab school attack revenge
dailyNews.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei vowed to continue attacks on Gulf neighbours and use leverage to close the Strait of Hormuz. He promised to avenge those killed in the war.

dailyNews.title: Epstein files: Convicted sex offender used modelling agencies to lure girls from South America, says report
dailyNews.description: More than six years after Jeffrey Epstein’s death, new testimonies from Brazilian women allege they were lured with modelling offers linked to his network. Authorities in Brazil are now investigating possible recruitment operations as newly released US files renew scrutiny of Epstein’s associates.

dailyNews.title: Honda scraps 3 EVs planned for the US, blaming tariffs and Chinese competition
dailyNews.description: The Japanese automaker said the change of plans will cost it up to $15.7 billion.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration asks Supreme Court to end TPS for Haitians
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has filed an emergency petition for the Supreme Court to end Temporary Protected Status (TPS) provided to thousands of Haitians. CBS News' Camilo Montoya-Galvez reports.

dailyNews.title: Tensions rise in Congress over Trump's elections bill and DHS funding lapse
dailyNews.description: President Trump is still pushing for Congress to pass the SAVE America Act, which could affect millions of American registered voters. Also, lawmakers are still at odds over funding for the Department of Homeland Security. CBS News' Taurean Small reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Housing affordability bill clears Senate as investor ban creates headaches
dailyNews.description: The Senate passed the bill 89-10, but House lawmakers say more changes are needed before it could go to President Donald Trump's desk.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed SAVE America Act will get a Senate vote next week, Thune says
dailyNews.description: Advocates of the voter-ID bill have pressed the Senate for months to call a vote on the controversial legislation.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration has scaled back oversight of student loan servicers, congressional watchdog finds
dailyNews.description: The Department of Education has scaled back its oversight of student loan servicers, a new report from the nonpartisan Government Accountability Office finds.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration launches Section 301 trade probes into Mexico, China, EU, others
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump was not authorized by the International Emergency Economic Powers Act, IEEPA, to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump to tap strategic oil reserve to bring down gas prices
dailyNews.description: With Iran attacking tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump and several other countries are tapping emergency reserves to bring down oil prices. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.
